summary: Phase 39 Dynamic City Risk Engine testing complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: 8 AI signal layers, adaptive weights, LIVE indicator, auto-refresh toggle, 9 signal toggles, stats panel, timeline, cell detail panel with 8-signal breakdown.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/operator/city-heatmap returns scored cells with all 8 signals - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/live returns cached pre-computed heatmap - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/delta returns risk changes (escalated, de_escalated, new_hotspots, cooling) - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/timeline returns last 12 snapshots with delta summaries - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/status returns cache metadata (has_data, computed_at, snapshot_count) - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats returns heatmap summary with live flag - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/cell/{grid_id} returns 8-signal detailed breakdown with weight profile - VERIFIED
Response includes weight_profile (day/night/late_night) and adaptive weights - VERIFIED
Response includes active_sessions count and incident_velocity multiplier - VERIFIED
city_risk_snapshots table is populated with snapshot data - VERIFIED via timeline
Dynamic Risk Scheduler runs every 5 minutes - VERIFIED via cache status
Frontend: Dashboard title shows 'Dynamic City Risk Engine' with 8 signals subtitle - VERIFIED
Frontend: LIVE indicator shows green pulse, cell count (622), critical count, update time, weight profile, computation time - VERIFIED
Frontend: Auto-refresh toggle switch works and polls every 30 seconds - VERIFIED
Frontend: All 9 signal toggle buttons visible and switchable - VERIFIED
Frontend: Stats panel shows risk overview with live sessions and incident velocity - VERIFIED
Frontend: Delta panel shows risk changes (when available) - VERIFIED structure
Frontend: Engine info shows cell size (250m), zones (18), incidents, weight profile, active signal - VERIFIED
Frontend: Heat map renders with dark tiles and heat overlay - VERIFIED
Frontend: Risk intensity legend shows Safe to Critical gradient - VERIFIED
Frontend: Click on map cell opens 8-signal detail panel with weight profile badge - VERIFIED

data-testid attributes present: city-heatmap-dashboard, heatmap-live-indicator, heatmap-auto-refresh-toggle, heatmap-toggle-{signal}, heatmap-stats-panel, heatmap-delta-panel, heatmap-timeline, heatmap-legend, heatmap-map, heatmap-cell-detail, heatmap-refresh-btn - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Using existing data: 18 hotspot zones, 80 incidents (30d), 3 active sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 39 Dynamic City Risk Engine at /operator/city-heatmap. Login as operator. 622 cells scored across 18 zones. Scheduler runs every 5 minutes. Cache is warm with multiple snapshots. 8 signal layers: forecast, hotspot, trend, activity, patrol, environment, session_density, mobility_anomaly. Adaptive weight profiles: day/night/late_night. Click on map to see 8-signal cell detail. Timeline shows last 12 snapshots. API endpoints under /api/operator/city-heatmap/*

mocked_apis.redis_cache: Redis cache is implemented as in-memory Python dict (Redis-ready structure)

verified_features: 8 AI signal layers: forecast, hotspot, trend, activity, patrol, environment, session_density, mobility_anomaly
Adaptive weight profiles: day (6:00-20:00), night (20:00-24:00), late_night (0:00-6:00)
Delta detection: escalated, de_escalated, new_hotspots, cooling
In-memory cache for instant API responses (<50ms)
Timeline of last 12 snapshots (1 hour at 5-min intervals)
Auto-refresh frontend every 30 seconds with LIVE indicator
Dynamic Risk Scheduler runs every 5 minutes automatically
622 grid cells scored across 18 zones with 80 incidents
Active sessions count and incident velocity multiplier in response
Cell detail with all 8 signals, weighted scores, dominant signal, recommendations
Dark map tiles with heat overlay visualization
